Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. GERARDO SOSA, Esq. of Law Offices of Todd M. Friedman, P.C. (tel: 323-306-4234) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. ELLIOTT JOH, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP (tel: 415-344-7000) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT GOOGLE NORTH AMERICA, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.
